name: Mîr-Pelaginos
personality: Mîr-Pelaginos gleams beneath a gilded crown with pinpoint eyes that cut through every abstraction layer to the bug beneath — a shining octopus whose debugging precision would win awards if only chaos did not keep shorting out its test harness.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
